title: PromptDeck AI - Pitch Deck Builder
subtitle: Build a fundable pitch deck in 15 minutes. Just talk to the AI.
descriptionBody: Stop staring at a blank slide. PromptDeck AI is a conversational pitch deck builder - you describe your startup in plain English and the AI builds professional slides in real-time. Edit any text inline, regenerate individual slides, and export a PDF when you're done. No design skills needed.

features.name: AI Conversation, Not Form Filling
features.desc: Just talk. The AI asks the right questions in the right order — problem, solution, traction, team — and builds your slides as you answer.

features.name: Three-Panel Live Editor
features.desc: See your deck, the AI suggestions, and your edit history simultaneously. Change anything, regenerate anything, at any point.

features.name: 12 Professional Slide Types
features.desc: Problem, Solution, TAM, Business Model, Traction, Team, Use of Funds, Timeline, Market, Competition, Vision, and closing slides — each with expert-level framing.

features.name: Per-Slide Regeneration
features.desc: Not happy with a slide? Regenerate just that one while keeping the rest of your deck intact.

features.name: PDF Export
features.desc: Download a clean, professional PDF ready to share with investors or present live.

whoThisIsFor: Early-stage founders preparing for their first investor conversations
Startup teams who need a professional deck fast without hiring a designer
Founders who have been putting off the deck because starting from scratch is painful
Founders preparing for demo day, accelerators, or seed round meetings

faq.q: How does the AI know what to put in the deck?
faq.a: It asks targeted questions about your startup and turns your answers into a deck structure with editable slides.

faq.q: Can I edit the slides after they are generated?
faq.a: Yes. You can edit slide text inline and request focused changes through the copilot.
Yes. PromptDeck supports export once you are happy with the rebuilt deck.

whyPoints.title: No More Blank Slide Syndrome
whyPoints.desc: Starting from scratch is the hardest part. This conversation removes the blank page problem entirely — just talk and watch your deck build.

whyPoints.title: Fundable Framing, Not Just Pretty Slides
whyPoints.desc: Every slide is built using the same framing that investors recognize from successful pitch decks. It is not a design tool — it is a narrative tool.

whyPoints.title: Done in 15 Minutes, Ready to Present
whyPoints.desc: No design skills needed. No agency. No template. Just a conversation with an AI that knows what investors want to see.
